identity.name: MANUTRIX
identity.aesthetic: Dark Industrial, HUD (Heads-Up Display), High Contrast, Utility-First

technical_stack.fonts: Google Fonts (Barlow Condensed, Inter, JetBrains Mono)

background.description: Deep void blue/black for maximum contrast in low light

surface.description: Slightly lighter panels for card separation

headings.usage: Page titles, KPI numbers, Modal headers. Adds the 'Industrial' feel.

mono.usage: Asset Tags, QR Codes, Serial Numbers, Technical Specs.

navigation.mobile: Fixed Bottom Navigation Bar (Home, Inspections, Scan, Assets, Profile)
navigation.desktop: Sidebar Navigation (collapsed by default to maximize data view)

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-slate-950 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-emerald-400

cards.style: Flat, bordered, no shadow or hard shadow.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows for separation.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Subtle striped backgrounds (hazard stripes) for warning areas.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid. Use solid high-contrast backgrounds for readability.
visual_enhancers.animations: Instant feedback. minimize drift/fade. Snap transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FONTS: Import 'Barlow Condensed' (weights 600,700), 'Inter' (400,500), and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
2. THEME OVERRIDE: Modify `index.css` :root and .dark variables. Set --background to '222 47% 5%' (Slate 950) and --primary to '160 84% 39%' (Emerald 500). Ensure these values are applied.
3. MOBILE NAV: Create a `BottomNav` component for mobile viewports (< md) with icons: Home, ClipboardCheck (Inspections), Scan (Center, Large), Box (Assets), User.
4. QR SCANNER: The center button of the mobile nav should be a prominent 'SCAN' button (larger than others, primary color).
5. TOUCH ZONES: Ensure all clickable elements (buttons, list items, checkboxes) have `min-h-[48px]` and `min-w-[48px]` for gloved usage.
6. OFFLINE INDICATOR: Implement a global banner that appears at the top when navigator.onLine is false (Amber/Red background).
7. LISTS: Use 'Card Lists' for assets/work orders on mobile. Row-based tables only on desktop.
8. COMPATIBILITY: Do not delete existing Shadcn components. Customize them via `className` props or wrapper components.
universal_guidelines: Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text).
Avoid gradients for text. Use solid colors.
All forms must have validation feedback.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for content loading.
